auto-format.description: Auto-formats files after Write/Edit using ruff (Python) or eslint (JS/TS)

block-dangerous-commands.description: Blocks rm -rf /, force push to main, hard reset, DROP TABLE, etc.

detect-secrets.description: Blocks writes containing secret-looking content (API keys, tokens, private key blocks)

guard-sensitive-files.description: Blocks edits to .env files, key material (.pem/.key/id_rsa), and credential dotfiles
